title: ctenitis obtusiloba
intro: Ctenitis obtusiloba, also known as the obtusilobed ctenitis or obtusilobed fern, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Ctenitis obtusiloba include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve respiratory health, and provide antioxidant protection against cell damage. Ctenitis obtusiloba can be prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, allowing for a variety of applications in traditional medicine.
